rbac.correction: Use a scoped role assignment list with --include-inherited and without --all.

cost.correction: Group Cost Management usage by ResourceId only; preserve Currency from returned columns rather than grouping by it.

backup.correction: Enumerate Recovery Services vaults and AzureIaasVM protected items using existing Azure CLI commands; do not install extensions.

success_criteria: RBAC observation returns assignments or an authoritative empty result.
Month-to-date cost observation returns data or an authoritative empty result without an invalid grouping.
Backup observation examines existing Recovery Services vaults without installing tools and preserves not_observed on query failure.
No Azure mutation, guest command, transaction replay, deployment, or cleanup occurs.
rollback: No Azure rollback is required for a read-only observation. Delete local evidence if it contains identifiers that were not sanitized.
